summary: Patch release of lodash fixes CVE-2021-23337 (command injection in _.template) and tightens a ReDoS-prone regex. No new capabilities, no install-time behavior added, no dependency changes. Mainstream popular package baseline.
developer_safe_summary: ModuleWarden allowed lodash@4.17.21. The release is a documented security fix with no install-time behaviour or capability changes.
security_admin_summary: ALLOW lodash@4.17.21. Demonstrates that the gate does not stamp BLOCK on every popular package: this release improves security posture (CVE-2021-23337 patched) without adding capability risk.
